name: Weather
description: Get real-time weather information for any city. Supports current conditions, hourly and weekly forecasts.
author: Akasha Team
readme: Ask about weather in any city. Say 'weather in Paris' or 'forecast for tomorrow'.

name: Timer & Reminders
description: Set timers, alarms and reminders directly from your assistant. Get notified at the right time.
author: Akasha Team
readme: Say 'set a timer for 10 minutes' or 'remind me at 3pm to call mom'.

name: Calculator
description: Perform complex mathematical calculations, unit conversions and currency exchange with natural language.
author: Akasha Team
readme: Say 'what is 15% of 250' or 'convert 5 kilometers to miles'.

name: Notes
description: Create, search and manage your personal notes. All stored locally with optional encryption.
author: Akasha Team
readme: Say 'take a note: buy groceries' or 'show my notes about work'.

name: Translator
description: Translate text between 50+ languages instantly. Supports speech recognition and output.
author: CommunityDev
readme: Say 'translate hello to French' or 'how do you say thank you in Japanese'.

name: News Digest
description: Get personalized news summaries from your favorite sources. Respects your privacy — no tracking.
author: CommunityDev
readme: Say 'top news today' or 'tech headlines this week'.

name: File Manager
description: Browse, search and manage your local files and folders using natural language commands.
author: Akasha Team
readme: Say 'find all PDFs in my documents' or 'open Downloads folder'.

name: Music Controller
description: Control your music player, adjust volume and manage playlists with voice or text commands.
author: CommunityDev
readme: Say 'play some jazz' or 'skip song' or 'volume up'.

name: System Monitor
description: Monitor CPU, RAM, disk usage and running processes. Get alerts when resources are running low.
author: Akasha Team
readme: Say 'show system stats' or 'what is using the most CPU'.

name: Code Helper
description: Get quick code snippets, syntax help, and documentation lookups for popular programming languages.
author: CommunityDev
readme: Say 'how do I read a file in Python' or 'show me a JavaScript fetch example'.

name: Calendar
description: Manage your calendar events, check your schedule and get upcoming event reminders.
author: Akasha Team
readme: Say 'what is on my calendar tomorrow' or 'add a meeting on Friday at 2pm'.

name: Crypto Tracker
description: Track cryptocurrency prices and get portfolio summaries in real time.
author: CommunityDev
readme: Say 'Bitcoin price' or 'show my crypto portfolio'.
